title: justicia rictus
intro: Justicia rictus, also known as the toothache plant, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Justicia rictus include its ability to relieve toothache pain, reduce inflammation, and alleviate fever. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
